text: Achinta Hazra 📞7602699715| ✉️ achintahazra8515@gmail.com | Arambagh, Hooghly | https://github.com/Achinta005 www.linkedin.com/in/achinta-hazra |🌐https://www.achintahazra.shop I am a Computer Science undergraduate with hands-on experience in Machine Learning, Full-Stack Web Development, and Generative AI.
